title: Generating novel scientific hypotheses with Co-Scientist
summary: Co-Scientist is a Gemini-based multi-agent AI system developed by Google DeepMind that iteratively generates, debates, and evolves novel hypotheses for complex scientific problems. It is designed to accelerate scientific breakthroughs by helping researchers connect disparate facts and formulate testable hypotheses.
